hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); ap=os.path.abspath(p) if p else ''; blocked_exact=['.env','.env.local','.env.production','.env.development']; blocked_dirs=['.git/','node_modules/','.vercel/']; blocked_names=['CLAUDE.md','AGENTS.md']; blocked_prefixes=['.claude/skills/','.claude/agents/']; hit=any(os.path.basename(ap)==b for b in blocked_exact) or any(('/'+b) in (ap+'/') for b in blocked_dirs) or any(os.path.basename(ap)==b for b in blocked_names) or any(b in ap for b in blocked_prefixes); sys.exit(2 if hit else 0)"

python3 -c "import json,sys,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); protected=['.github/workflows/','pnpm-lock.yaml']; hit=any(x in p for x in protected); sys.exit(2 if hit else 0)"

echo '--- FORGE CONTEXT RECOVERY ---'; echo 'You are running as a Forge pipeline stage.'; if [ -f .forge-temp/current-issue ]; then echo "Working on issue #$(cat .forge-temp/current-issue)"; fi; echo 'Complete your current stage task and post the output comment.'; echo '--- END RECOVERY ---'

python3 -c "import json,sys,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); os.makedirs('.forge-temp',exist_ok=True); f=open('.forge-temp/session.log','a'); f.write(p+'\n') if p else None; f.close()"

python3 -c "import json,sys,time; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); gh_muts=['gh issue create','gh issue comment','gh issue edit','gh issue close','gh issue develop','gh pr create','gh pr comment','gh pr edit','gh label create']; api_flags=[' -f ',' -X POST',' -X PATCH',' -X PUT',' -X DELETE']; is_mut=any(m in cmd for m in gh_muts) or ('gh api' in cmd and any(f in cmd for f in api_flags)); time.sleep(1) if is_mut else None"

python3 -c "import os
session_log='.forge-temp/session.log'
if os.path.exists(session_log): os.remove(session_log)"
